content:
校慶開場預熱——大額抽獎券掉落！獎券有100個數字，其中50個數字藏了豐厚獎品，來看看都有什麼吧🥰

**⭐獎品一覽**
周邊組合A（含火漆印×隨機喚醒體明信片）-5人
周邊組合B（含書籤×隨機鐳射票×隨機光柵卡）-5人
高階課題-5人
月相觀測-5人
流明之芯（10抽）-5人
無垢之芯（10抽）-10人
1000銀芯-5人
500銀芯-10人

**⭐參與方式**
━ 在留言區許願1~100中的1個數字，附上UID，並寫下你對《忘卻前夜》1.5週年的祝福，即視為參與成功！
━ *活動截止時間：5月23日 14:00（UTC+8）*，屆時我們將在留言區公布刮開後的完整獎券圖片，並隨機抽選留言開獎！

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Warm-up for the school anniversary opening—large-value raffle tickets dropped! The lottery ticket has 100 numbers, 50 of which contain rich prizes. Let's see what they are.

**⭐ Prizes at a Glance**
Peripheral set A (including wax seal × random awaker postcard) -5 people
Peripheral set B (including bookmark × random laser ticket × random grating card)-5 people
Advanced Assignments-5 people
Moon phase observation-5 people
Lumen Core (10 draws) -5 people
Pure Core (10 draws) -10 people
1000 Silver-5 people
500 Silver-10 people

**⭐How to participate**
━ Make a wish for a number between 1 and 100 in the comment area, attach your UID, and write down your best wishes for the 1.5th anniversary of "Morimens", and you will be considered to have successfully participated!
━ *Event deadline: May 23, 14:00 (UTC+8)*, at which time we will post the complete scratch ticket image in the message area and randomly select the message to draw the prize!
@everyone
thread_title: 活動結束|Event ends🎊幸運獎券：50份大禮花落誰家┊Lucky lottery ticket:  50 big gifts

content:
**【1.5週年彌薩格校慶·福利前瞻】**
銀鑰授予儀式上的宣講詞猶在耳畔「成為彌薩格大學的調查員，意味著你們的餘生將與死亡和瘋狂為伴……」1.5年、548個日夜，感謝守密人始終堅定地與彌薩格並肩而立，一起走在對抗融蝕的深淵之路💗

⭐精心籌備的1.5週年校慶即將與大家見面，我們為守密人準備了諸多精彩節目與回饋好禮！祝大家玩得開心~

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

**【1.5-year Mythag School Celebration • Benefits Preview】**
The speech at the Silver Key Award Ceremony is still ringing in our ears: "Becoming an investigator at Mythag University means spending the rest of your life amidst death and madness...."
1.5 years, 548 days and nights, thank you Keeper for always standing firmly with Mythag, walking together on the abyss road against Dissolution💗

⭐The carefully prepared 1.5-year anniversary celebration is about to meet you. We have prepared many wonderful programs and gifts for the keepers! We wish you all a happy time~
@everyone
thread_title: 🎊1.5週年福利前瞻┊1.5th Anniversary Benefits Preview
